const tmpPath = '/tmp/gh-aw/aw_info.json';
fs.writeFileSync(tmpPath, JSON.stringify(awInfo, null, 2));
console.log('Generated aw_info.json at:', tmpPath);
console.log(JSON.stringify(awInfo, null, 2));

core.setOutput('model', awInfo.model);

2026-03-30T09:39:23.9082991Z The pull request has been created. Here's a summary of all the inconsistencies found and fixed:
2026-03-30T09:39:23.9084337Z 
2026-03-30T09:39:23.9084544Z ## Inconsistencies Fixed
2026-03-30T09:39:23.9084837Z 
2026-03-30T09:39:23.9085769Z ### 1. `Quickstart-on-how-to-write-tests.md` — Outdated test framework (Mocha/Chai → Vitest)
2026-03-30T09:39:23.9099941Z The code examples used `import { assert } from "chai"` and `import { Context } from "mocha"` with Mocha-style `this` context in `beforeEach`. The project migrated to Vitest. All examples updated to use `vitest` imports, arrow functions with `ctx` parameter, and `TestInfo` from `@azure-tools/test-recorder`.
2026-03-30T09:39:23.9101874Z 
2026-03-30T09:39:23.9102309Z ### 2. Node.js version requirements — Three files
2026-03-30T09:39:23.9104305Z `Quickstart-on-how-to-write-tests.md`, `Generate-code-from-TypeSpec.md`, and `migrating-to-typespec.md` all said "LTS versions of Node.js" while `package.json` requires `>=20`. Updated to "Node.js 20 or later" (consistent with DPG-quickstart.md and RLC-quickstart.md).
2026-03-30T09:39:23.9106085Z 
2026-03-30T09:39:23.9106511Z ### 3. `golden-testing-commands.md` — `npm run` → `pnpm run`
2026-03-30T09:39:23.9107587Z All test commands used `npm run` instead of `pnpm run`, inconsistent with the project's enforced `pnpm` package manager.
2026-03-30T09:39:23.9108593Z 
2026-03-30T09:39:23.9109228Z ### 4. `migrating-to-typespec.md` — Wrong `tsp-client` installation and `npm run` → `pnpm run`
2026-03-30T09:39:24.6811140Z - Instructed `npm install -g @azure-tools/typespec-client-generator-cli` (global install) while all other docs use the repo-managed `npm --prefix eng/common/tsp-client ci` approach.
2026-03-30T09:39:24.6812913Z - The example `package.json` script used bare `tsp-client` command which requires a global install.
2026-03-30T09:39:24.6862620Z - SDK development commands used `npm run` instead of `pnpm run`.
2026-03-30T09:39:24.6863134Z 
2026-03-30T09:39:24.6917033Z

Node.js version requirement updated**\n- Changed \"Any of [the LTS versions of Node.js]\" → \"Node.js 20 or later\"\n- Reason: `package.json` at repo root requires `\"node\": \"\u003e=20\"`. Other docs (DPG-quickstart.md, RLC-quickstart.md) already correctly state \"Node.js 20 or later\".\n\n**2. `glossary.spec.ts` code example updated (Mocha → Vitest)**\n- Replaced `import { assert } from \"chai\"` with vitest import: `import { describe, it, assert, beforeEach, afterEach } from \"vitest\"`\n- Removed Mocha's `this` context pattern (`beforeEach(async function () { ... createRecorder(this) }`) in favor of vitest arrow function with `ctx` parameter\n- Added `.js` extensions to local imports (required for ESM)\n- Reason: The project uses Vitest, not Mocha/Chai. Actual test files (e.g., `sdk/purview/purview-datamap-rest/test/public/glossary.spec.ts`) confirm this.\n\n**3. `utils/recordedClient.ts` code example updated (Mocha Context → TestInfo)**\n- Replaced `import { Context } from \"mocha\"` with `import type { TestInfo } from \"@azure-tools/test-recorder\"`\n- Updated `createRecorder(context: Context)` → `createRecorder(context: TestInfo)`\n- Changed `new Recorder(context.currentTest)` → `new Recorder(context)` (matches recorder v4 API)\n- Added `.js` extensions to local imports\n- Reason: The actual `sdk/purview/purview-datamap-rest/test/public/utils/recordedClient.ts` uses `TestInfo` from `@azure-tools/test-recorder`.\n\n**4. `monitor.spec.ts` code example updated (Mocha/Chai → Vitest)**\n- Replaced `import { assert } from \"chai\"` and `import { Context } from \"mocha\"` with `import { describe, it, assert, beforeEach, afterEach } from \"vitest\"`\n- Updated `beforeEach(async function (this: Context)` → `beforeEach(async (ctx) =\u003e`\n- Changed `new Recorder(this.currentTest)` → `new Recorder(ctx)`\n- Added `.js` extension to local import\n- Reason: Consistent with the project's Vitest-based testing framework.\n\n---\n\n### `documentation/Generate-code-from-TypeSpec.md`\n\n- Updated Node.js prerequisite from \"[LTS versions of Node.js]\" → \"Node.js 20 or later\"\n- Reason: Same as above — `package.json` requires `\u003e=20`.\n\n---\n\n### `documentation/golden-testing-commands.md`\n\n- Replaced `npm run test:browser` → `pnpm run test:browser`\n- Replaced `npm run test:node` → `pnpm run test:node`\n- Replaced `npm run unit-test:node` → `pnpm run unit-test:node`\n- Replaced `npm run integration-test:node` → `pnpm run integration-test:node`\n- Reason: The repository uses `pnpm` as the enforced package manager (via `preinstall` hook). All SDK development commands should use `pnpm`.\n\n---\n\n### `documentation/migrating-to-typespec.md`\n\n**1. Node.js version requirement updated**\n- Changed \"[Node.js LTS version]\" → \"Node.js 20 or later\"\n\n**2. `tsp-client` installation updated**\n- Replaced `npm install -g @azure-tools/typespec-client-generator-cli` with `npm --prefix eng/common/tsp-client ci`\n- Reason: Other docs (DPG-quickstart.md, RLC-quickstart.md) use the repo-managed installation at `eng/common/tsp-client`. This is consistent with the repository's approach of managing tool versions.\n\n**3. `generate:client` script example updated**\n- Updated the package.json script example to use `npm --prefix ../../../eng/common/tsp-client exec --no -- tsp-client update` instead of bare `tsp-client update -d`\n- Reason: If `tsp-client` is not installed globally, the bare `tsp-client` command would fail. The repo-managed approach is more reliable.\n\n**4. SDK development commands updated**\n- Replaced `npm run generate:client`, `npm run build`, `npm run test` → `pnpm run ...`\n- Reason: Consistent use of pnpm for SDK development.\n\n---\n\n## Validation\n\nAll changes were verified against:\n- `package.json` `engines` field: `\"node\": \"\u003e=20\"`\n- Actual test files in `sdk/purview/purview-datamap-rest/test/public/` (vitest + TestInfo patterns)\n- `eng/common/tsp-client/package.json` (confirms repo-managed tsp-client installation)\n- `CONTRIBUTING.md` (confirms pnpm as the required package manager)\n","branch":"docs/fix-documentation-inconsistencies","title":"docs: fix inconsistencies in documentation files"},"name":"create_pull_request"}}}

2026-03-30T09:39:41.1950120Z ##[warning]Node.js 20 actions are deprecated. The following actions are running on Node.js 20 and may not work as expected: actions/download-artifact@018cc2cf5baa6db3ef3c5f8a56943fffe632ef53. Actions will be forced to run with Node.js 24 by default starting June 2nd, 2026. Node.js 20 will be removed from the runner on September 16th, 2026. Please check if updated versions of these actions are available that support Node.js 24. To opt into Node.js 24 now, set the FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24=true environment variable on the runner or in your workflow file. Once Node.js 24 becomes the default, you can temporarily opt out by setting ACTIONS_ALLOW_USE_UNSECURE_NODE_VERSION=true. For more information see: https://github.blog/changelog/2025-09-19-deprecation-of-node-20-on-github-actions-runners/
